title: My School Morning
subtitle: 小学示范课
summary: 用小学阶段高频词做一个早晨上学场景练习。

sentences.en: I walk to school with my best friend.
sentences.zh: 我和我最好的朋友走路去学校。

sentences.en: Our teacher opens the classroom at eight.
sentences.zh: 我们的老师八点打开教室。

sentences.en: We read a short story and answer easy questions.
sentences.zh: 我们读一个小故事，并回答简单的问题。

sentences.en: After class, we play basketball in the sun.
sentences.zh: 下课后，我们在阳光下打篮球。
